name: jojo-hospitality-intelligence-kit
description: Starter kit for a human-approved hospitality intelligence pilot around Harzfenster, Hotel Goertler, and the FrankX hospitality vertical.

install.start: Read README.md and 01-owner-operating-map.md, then choose one pilot workflow.
install.acos: Install ACOS later only after one workflow proves useful.

privacy: Keep guest names, preferences, allergies, payment data, private notes, staff records, and internal operating details in private workspaces. Publish only approved, non-private patterns.
